name: Katrina Group Ltd.
summary: Katrina Group Ltd., an investment holding company, owns and operates restaurants and cafes. The company operates through two segments, Hospitality, and Food and Beverages. It serves Hong Kong, Indonesian, Japanese, Mexican, northern Chinese, Thai, Vietnamese, and Yunnan cuisines. The company also provides online food delivery services; manufactures and distributes foods; and offers domestic household cleaning services. It operates 42 restaurants in Singapore and 2 restaurants in Indonesia under the Bali, Thai, Honguo, So Pho, Streats, Bayang, Hutong, Muchos, RENNthai, and Tomo Izakaya food and beverage brands. The company leases and manages 241 private residences, and 2 apartment buildings comprising 68 apartment units, as well as 4 co-living hotels, including approximately 242 rooms across Singapore and 18 serviced apartments in Hong Kong. Katrina Group Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Singapore.
